creator: chess@chessgriffin.com
text:
Thank you for the help.  I verified that my /etc/rc.conf contains:

dbus_enable="YES"
polkitd_enable="YES"
hald_enable="YES"

I also verified that my user was a member of the 'operator' group.  I
can mount other removable media, such as my Cowon iAudio mp3 player
with no problems in Gnome/Xfce.

Anyway, I captured the output of the items requested at the link you
provided.  The following is that output:
